channel.title: Zeitschrift für Anglistik und Amerikanistik
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Anglistik und Amerikanistik

item.title: Editorial
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2001

item.title: Revisiting the Decadence of Edward Gibbon’s The History of the Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire (1776–1787)
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2004

item.title: “All Things Go to Decay”: Decadence in the Early Journals of Ralph Waldo Emerson
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2005

item.title: “Tired Hedonists” in Los Angeles: F. Scott Fitzgerald’s Last Tycoon
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2006

item.title: Decadent Artwork in the Sixties Counterculture Magazines International Times and Oz
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2007

item.title: “Good Things Don’t Last Forever”: A Dalliance with Disco?
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2008

item.title: Decadence Today: Volutes, Unfurling Flowers, and Decolonial Excesses in Shola von Reinhold’s LOTE and Thuy On’s Decadence
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2025-2009

item.title: Willie van Peer and Anna Chesnokova: Experiencing Poetry: A Guidebook to Psychopoetics
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2031

item.title: Franziska Quabeck: Not I – Kazuo Ishiguro and the Politics of Misrecognition
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2033

item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2032

item.title: Stefanie Mueller: The Corporation in the Nineteenth-Century American Imagination
item.description: Article by James Dorson DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zaa-2024-2030
